title: Totemic
description: A mod with a focus on Totems, music and nature
body:
![Totemic logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GLffYJtD/images/6223992af90f54c9914fa14d18b7b56609e01fb8.png)

This is a magic mod about Totem Poles, nature and the power of music.

The mod's main focus lies on Totem Poles. They can give passive boons to players nearby, but more importantly, they are the central piece of Ceremonies: Dancing around a Totem Pole and playing various musical instruments to invoke strong effects and manipulate the world.

[Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) is recommended so you get the *Totempedia*, an in-game guide to the mod's content.

Currently, only Forge/NeoForge are supported, but *ZestyBlaze* is working on a Fabric version. Stay tuned for that.

Totemic has built-in integration with KubeJS in 1.20.1+, no add-on mod is required (although this might change in the future). See the [KubeJS wiki](https://kubejs.com/wiki/addons/totemic) for the documentation.

### Modpacks:
You are free to include the mod in a modpack.

### Credits:
- *Pokefenn* for originally creating the mod
- *Sunconure11* for textures, models and many ideas
- *nojustgavin, Dylan Kaizer and Poppycocks* for creating lots of textures for the mod
- *Nefilto* for the Totem Pole models
- *Kerri Lake* for the Flute sounds, slightly changed in pitch and cut from [overblow.mp3](https://freesound.org/people/kerri/sounds/37144/), used under [CC BY 3.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/).
- *Kirindave, Wayoftime, Joshie* and *Emoniph* helped with code and ideas
- *Vazkii* for most of the (legacy) Totempedia code, based on Botania
- *wiiv* for the Tipi model
- *BigBadChris* for the logo
- *CyanideX* for the wind chime model
